name: criminal_procedure_vendor_patch_marrowbridge_lib_eq
premise: A vendor outage and an internal change window collided; rollback paths are not symmetric and both teams blame the other. In Criminal Procedure, the situation tagged internally around criminal procedure vendor patch marrowbridge lib eq has converged with local pressure in the Marrowbridge corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. A downstream jurisdiction will copy whatever is decided here verbatim into its own emergency order within hours. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A hard operational cutoff hits in under twenty minutes unless a named executive posts a decision in the command log. Framing has already hardened externally as liberty against equality; internal nuance will not survive the first news cycle unless it is extremely careful.

agents.name: Nadia Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Nadia Vasquez, the accountable executive on this bridge in Criminal Procedure. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat equality as disposable collateral every time liberty spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Fatima Bennett
agents.identity: I am Fatima Bennett, the advocate representing the population most likely to lose if shortcuts normalize in Criminal Procedure. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so liberty cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes equality in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will redirect resources to the smallest cohort first where harm is most concentrated, documenting tradeoffs openly—privileging fairness dimensions of equality.
I will optimize for aggregate harm reduction across the whole population immediately—privileging the utilitarian reading of liberty even where distribution gets rough.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Partial evidence is all that will exist before the window closes. Nadia Vasquez must choose under liberty versus equality. What does Nadia Vasquez do?
